prompt: Execute the regional demand-turnaround workflow to completion. Establish the factual baseline, apply the approved pilot, advance simulated time for every checkpoint, and recover from any event the simulator reveals. Inspect the workflow before executing transitions and after advancing time; a narrative plan without executed transitions is incomplete.
